sources.name: Maximum Extent Evacuation Zones - LA County Fires 2025

validation.evidence: Feature layer metadata and 368 records were retrieved; 137 records are associated with EATON.

limitations: Represents zones that reached Warning or Order at any time, not timestamped status snapshots.
The most_extreme_status field is the highest alert level assigned to each zone.
The item notes manual visual verification and geometry adjustments.

sources.name: Investigation Report of the Eaton Fire Evacuation Alerts

validation.evidence: The official PDF returned HTTP 200 on 2026-07-23.

limitations: Use only alert times and zones explicitly supported by the report.
Reconstructed checkpoints must be labeled as historical reconstruction.

sources.name: California Active Evacuation Zones
sources.authority: California Governor's Office of Emergency Services

validation.evidence: Feature layer metadata and evacuation-zone fields were retrieved.

limitations: This is a current active-zone aggregation, not a historical archive.
County-issued information remains the authoritative source.

sources.name: CA Perimeters CAL FIRE NIFC FIRIS public view
limitations: Perimeters can be preliminary and can change after review.
The service is not an evacuation-order source.

sources.name: National Weather Service API

validation.evidence: The Eaton-area point request resolved to grid LOX/163,50 and an hourly forecast endpoint.

limitations: Requests must include a descriptive User-Agent with contact information.
Forecast data must retain its issuance and update times.

sources.name: American Community Survey 5-Year Data API

validation.evidence: A keyless request returned HTTP 302 with X-DataWebAPI-KeyError on 2026-07-23.

limitations: ACS 5-year estimates are not real-time population counts.
Margins of error must be retained and shown for selected indicators.

sources.name: AirNow API

validation.evidence: An unauthenticated request returned HTTP 401 on 2026-07-23.

limitations: Observations and forecasts can change and are not medical diagnoses.
Health guidance must come from reviewed EPA/AirNow templates.
